find_metab_react("cpd00118", tidy_reactions[]) %>% datatable

#################################################
"legionaminate" 
blast_phold%>%
  filter(grepl("legiona", product, ignore.case=T))

blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("legiona", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% matches$react_id] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(mean_fba=mean(abs(fba_flux)),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions[react_id %in% matches$react_id] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") %>%
  filter(grepl("phosphoenolpyruvate", react_name))  -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

# Check functions involving the metabolite/functiona group
tidy_reactions[grepl("",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

#################################################
"ferredoxin" 
phold_annot2%>%
  filter(grepl("ferredoxin", product, ignore.case=T)) %>% pull(votu) %>% unique-> votus

votus %>% length
vir_analysis[votu %in% votus] 


blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("ferredoxin", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% "rxn05937_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% "rxn05937_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

mag_analysis[OTU %in% 
               unique(tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% matches$react_id, OTU])] %>%
  group_by(Order,Family) %>% count(sort = T)

# Check functions involving the metabolite/functiona group
tidy_reactions[grepl("",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

#################################################
"sulfurylase"
blast_phold%>%
  filter(grepl("sulfurylase", product, ignore.case=T))

blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("sulfurylase", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions[react_id %in% "rxn25839_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% "rxn25839_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

tidy_reactions[grepl("",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable
