```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
####################################################
"phosphoadenosine p"

phold_annot2%>%
  filter(grepl("phosphoadenosine", product, ignore.case=T)) %>% pull(votu) %>% unique-> votus
votus %>% length()
vir_analysis[votu %in% votus]

blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("phosphoadenosine", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% matches$react_id] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25)

tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn00379_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

mag_analysis[OTU %in% 
               unique(tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% matches$react_id, OTU])] %>%
  group_by(Order,Family) %>% count(sort = T)

#################################################
"nicotinamide-nucleo" # seems to have a fairly different function
blast_phold%>%
  filter(grepl("nicotinamide-nucleo", product, ignore.case=T))

blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("nicotinamide-nucleo", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions[react_id %in% c("rxn03372_c0", "rxn00361_c0")] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions[react_id %in% "rxn25839_c0"] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

# Check functions involving the metabolite/functiona group
tidy_reactions[grepl("",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

####################################################
"nicotinamide phospho" # seems to have a fairly different function
blast_phold%>%
  filter(grepl("nicotinamide phosp", product, ignore.case=T))

blastp_aux_gem_react_count %>%
  filter(grepl("nicotinamide phosp", product, ignore.case=T))-> matches;matches

tidy_reactions_f[react_id %in% matches$react_id] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux) %>% round(4),
            n=n()
            ) %>% print(n=25) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions[react_id %in% matches$react_id] %>% 
  group_by(react_id,react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$subsytems_ids, ";"))] %>% view

# Check functions involving the metabolite/functiona group
tidy_reactions[grepl("",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_id, react_id2, react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>%
  left_join(react_sbs_metab_info[,c("react_id2", "subsytems_ids", "subystems")], by="react_id2") -> res
res %>% datatable

#################################################

```



#----
# GATHER RESULTS

##AUX: Merge blastp aux hits with gems genes
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
gem_react_genes %>% 
  group_by(OTU, react_id, react_name) %>%
  reframe(gene=strsplit(gene, ";") %>% unlist) -> gem_react_genes_l
```

# AUX genes co-occurring
```{r, echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='show', eval=F}
# Genes together
selected_aux1 %>%
  group_by(votu) %>%
  summarise(
    n_aux=n(),
    aux_genes=paste(product, collapse = ";")
  ) 

selected_aux1 %>%
  select(votu, product) %>%
  unique %>%
  add_column(p=1) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = product, values_from = p, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("votu") %>% as.matrix -> aux_votu_mat
  aux_votu_mat[rowSums(aux_votu_mat)>1,]-> aux_votu_mat1
  
  Heatmap(aux_votu_mat1,
          col = c("white", "orange"),
          rect_gp = gpar(col = "gray20", lwd = 0.4),
          row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=0),
          column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
          column_names_rot = 45,
          heatmap_width = unit(10, "in"),
          heatmap_height = unit(10, "in")
          ) 
```

# AUX: Distribution of AVG across predicted vOTUs
```{r, echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='show', eval=F}
iphop_mags2[] %>%
  select(votu=virus, Order) %>% 
  unique %>%
  left_join(phold_annot3) %>%
  select(votu, Order, func, product) %>% unique %>%
    filter(grepl("Aux|Oth", func)) %>%
  ungroup %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  count(product) %>%
  view
```

# DEF: Classify metab use by order
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
foreach(metabolite=unique(tidy_exhanges$id), .errorhandling = "remove")%do%{
  tidy_exhanges[id==metabolite] -> dt
  metab_name<-unique(dt$name)
  dt %>%
    group_by(Order) %>%
    summarise(
              median_imp=median(fba_flux[fba_flux<0]),
              median_exp=median(fba_flux[fba_flux>0]),
              n_imp=sum(fba_flux<0),
              n_exp=sum(fba_flux>0),
              n_use=n()
              ) %>%
    left_join(order_nmags) %>%
    filter(n>=5) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      fisher = list(
        fisher.test(
          matrix(c(n_imp, n - n_imp,
                   n_exp, n - n_exp),
                 nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
        )
      ),
      p_value   = fisher$p.value,
      odds_ratio = fisher$estimate) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr")) %>%
    filter(p_value<=0.05) %>%
    add_column(id=metabolite, name=metab_name) %>%
    select(id, name, Order, median_imp, median_exp, n_imp, n_exp, n_use, n, odds_ratio, p_adj)
  } %>% rbindlist -> order_metab_fisher

order_metab_fisher %>%
  filter(odds_ratio>1) -> order_metab_fisher_imported
order_metab_fisher %>%
  filter(odds_ratio<1) -> order_metab_fisher_exported
  

# Number of orders classifiables
order_metab_fisher %>%
  pull(Order) %>% unique %>% length #20

# Average number of aminoacids classified
order_metab_fisher %>% 
  left_join(key_metabolites %>%
  select(name, simple_category) %>% unique)->order_metab_fisher1


# Check frequent substrates
order_metab_fisher1 %>%
  filter(odds_ratio>1) %>%
  group_by(simple_category, name) %>% 
  summarise(prop=100*(length(unique(Order))/20)) %>%
  filter(prop>=90) -> frequent_metab

frequent_metab %>%
  group_by(simple_category) %>% count(sort = T)


# how many frequent metabolites are detect?
frequent_metab %>%
  filter(!simple_category %in% c("Metals", "Inorganic compounds")) %>%
  pull(name) %>% length

intersect(
metab_react_matched_cpds3$name,
frequent_metab$name) %>% length

13/22

# What is their median fluxes
order_metab_fisher1[name %in% frequent_metab$name] %>%
    filter(odds_ratio>1) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
    summarise(median=median(median_imp )) -> freq_median_f

table(freq_median_f$median<(-1))

```

# Top producers by Order
```{r eval=T, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
order_nmags %>%
  filter(n>=5) %>% pull(Order) -> teastable

foreach(i=unique(tidy_exhanges$name), .errorhandling = "remove")%do%{
  tidy_exhanges %>%
  #filter(abs(fba_flux) > 0.00) %>%
  filter(Order %in% teastable) %>%
  filter(name == i) -> dt
  g <- unique(dt$Order)
  do.call(rbind, lapply(g, function(gr) {
    x <- dt$fba_flux[dt$Order == gr]
    y <- dt$fba_flux[dt$Order != gr]
    data.frame(
      group = gr,
      n_group = length(x),
      n_rest = length(y),
      median_group = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rest = median(y, na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = wilcox.test(x, y, alternative = "greater", exact = FALSE)$p.value
    )
      }))  %>% 
    add_column(name=i) -> df
  df %>%
      add_column(p_adj=
        df$p_value %>% p.adjust(method = "fdr"))
  } %>% rbindlist() %>%
  filter(p_value<0.05 & n_group>=5) %>% filter(median_group>0) %>%
  mutate(p_adj=round(p_adj, 5)) %>%
    mutate(FC=round((median_rest-median_group)/median_group, 3))-> top_prod

```

# Top consumers by Order
```{r eval=T, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
order_nmags %>%
  filter(n>=5) %>% pull(Order) -> teastable

foreach(i=unique(tidy_exhanges$name), .errorhandling = "remove")%do%{
  tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% teastable) %>%
  #filter(fba_flux < 0.00) %>%
  filter(name == i) -> dt
  g <- unique(dt$Order)
  do.call(rbind, lapply(g, function(gr) {
    x <- dt$fba_flux[dt$Order == gr]
    y <- dt$fba_flux[dt$Order != gr]
    data.frame(
      group = gr,
      n_group = length(x),
      n_rest = length(y),
      median_group = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rest = median(y, na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = wilcox.test(x, y, alternative = "less", exact = FALSE)$p.value
    ) 
  })) %>% 
    add_column(name=i) -> df
  df %>%
      add_column(p_adj=
        df$p_value %>% p.adjust(method = "BH"))
  } %>% rbindlist() %>%
  filter(p_value<0.05) %>% filter(median_group<0) %>% 
  mutate(p_adj=round(p_adj, 5))%>%
    mutate(FC=round((median_rest-median_group)/median_group, 3))-> top_sub
```

# Produced plots
```{r eval=F, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
top_prod1<-rbind(top_prod[p_adj<=0.05],top_sub[p_adj<=0.05])

iphop_mags2 %>% 
  group_by(Phylum, Order) %>%
  summarise(sum=length(unique(virus))) %>%
    arrange(sum) %>% 
  filter(sum>=5 & 
         Order %in% mag_analysis$Order) %>% unique %>%
  pull(Order) %>% str_remove_all("o__")-> sorted_votus2

order_nmags %>%
  filter(n>=5) %>% pull(Order)-> testable

tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Acetate") %>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order %in% top_prod1[name=="Acetate", group]~ T))-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p1
dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted

ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p1), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Acetate") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("lightblue"), na.value = "white")-> p1


#####################
tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Succinate") %>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order %in% top_prod1[name=="Succinate", group] ~ T))-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p2
dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p2), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Succinate") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("")+
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("lightblue"), na.value = "white")->p2

#####################
tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Ammonium")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod1[name=="Ammonium", group] ~ T))-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p3
dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p3), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Ammonium") +
  
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab(expression(atop("Exchange flux", mmol~g[DW]^{-1}~h^{-1}))) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("lightblue"), na.value = "white")->p3

#####################
tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="CO2")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod1[name=="CO2", group] ~ T))-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p4

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p4), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Carbon dioxide") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab(expression(atop("Exchange flux", mmol~g[DW]^{-1}~h^{-1}))) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("lightblue"), na.value = "white")->p4


require(patchwork)
(p1+p2) / (p3+p4)->pf

ggsave(plot = pf, filename = "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.png",
       height = 8,width = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600
       )
file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.png")


ggsave(plot = pf, filename = "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.pdf",
       height = 8,width = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600
       )
file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.pdf")


#####################
tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Ethanol")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod1[name=="Ethanol", group] ~ T))-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p4

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p4), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Methanethiol") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("Exchange flux [mmol/gDWh]") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("lightblue"), na.value = "white")
```

```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}

#####
tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Succinate")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Succinate", group]  ~ "Produced",
                        Order%in%top_sub[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Succinate", group] ~ "Consumed")
         )-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p1

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p1), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Succinate") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(Produced="red3",Consumed="lightblue"), na.value = "white")-> p1
#####


tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Acetate")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Acetate", group]  ~ "Produced",
                        Order%in%top_sub[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Acetate", group] ~ "Consumed")
         )-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p2

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p2), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Acetate") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values =  c(Produced="red3",Consumed="lightblue"), na.value = "white")-> p2

####

tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="Ammonium")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Ammonium", group]  ~ "Produced",
                        Order%in%top_sub[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="Ammonium", group] ~ "Consumed")
         )-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p3

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p3), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Ammonium") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("Exchange flux [mmol/gDWh]") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values =  c(Produced="red3",Consumed="lightblue"), na.value = "white")-> p3

####

tidy_exhanges %>%
  filter(Order %in% testable) %>%
  filter(name=="CO2")%>%
  mutate(votu=case_when(Order%in%top_prod[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="CO2", group]  ~ "Produced",
                        Order%in%top_sub[p_adj<=0.05 & name=="CO2", group] ~ "Consumed")
         )-> dt

dt$fba_flux %>% median->med_p4

dt %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
    summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  arrange((median)) -> sorted
ggplot(dt %>%
        mutate(Order=factor(Order, levels=sorted$Order)),
       aes(x = fba_flux, y = Order, fill = votu)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=med_p4), color="red", linetype = "dashed", size=1)+
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Carbon dioxide") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("Exchange flux [mmol/gDWh]") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values =  c(Produced="red3",Consumed="lightblue"), na.value = "white") -> p4





(p1+p2) / (p3+p4)->pf

ggsave(plot = pf, filename = "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.png",
       height = 8,width = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600
       )
file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/boxplot_products_vir.png")

```

#---
#FIGURES
## Metabolites ranked by flux
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
tidy_exhanges %>%
  group_by(name,simple_category) %>%
  summarise(median_pos=median(fba_flux[fba_flux>0], na.rm = T),
            median_neg=median(fba_flux[fba_flux<0], na.rm = T),
            prop_pos=round(100*(sum(fba_flux[fba_flux>0], na.rm = T)/311),2),
            prop_neg=round(100*(sum(fba_flux[fba_flux<0], na.rm = T)/311),2)
            ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_pos)) -> exchanges_summary
```

##Heatmap: MetaB utilisation by order v2
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
#####  HM O2
require(ComplexHeatmap)

# vOTU abundance by host order
votu_host_order_abund<-fread("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/tables/votu_host_order_mean.csv")
votu_host_order_abund$Order = str_remove(votu_host_order_abund$Order,"o__")
votu_host_order_abund_vec<-votu_host_order_abund$mean
names(votu_host_order_abund_vec) = votu_host_order_abund$Order

# Select thos with at least two votus
votu_order_count_all %>%
  filter(n_votu>=2) -> order_min2_votu

# Select which categories to plot
unique(tidy_exhanges$simple_category)
selected_classes<-c(
    "Polysaccharides", "Carbohydrates", "Sugar Alcohols",
    "Alcohols", "Carbonyl compounds",
    "Sulfur compounds",
    "N-Carbonyl compounds","Amino acids", "Nitrogen compounds", "Inorganic compounds")

tax_lev="Order"

tidy_exhanges[Order %in% order_min2_votu$Order] %>%
  filter(abs(fba_flux)>0.001) %>%
  group_by(name, Order, simple_category) %>%
  summarise(n_flux=n()) %>%
  left_join(order_nmags[,c("Order", "n")]) %>%
  mutate(prop=n_flux/n) %>%
  filter(prop>0.2) -> freq_exc

tidy_exhanges[Order %in% order_min2_votu$Order] %>%
  filter(abs(fba_flux)>0.001) %>%
  select(name, simple_category, !!sym(tax_lev), fba_flux) %>%
  filter(simple_category %in% selected_classes) %>%
  group_by(name, simple_category, !!sym(tax_lev)) %>%
  summarise(median=median(fba_flux)) %>%
  mutate(
    tax=as.factor(!!sym(tax_lev)),
    name=factor(name, levels=unique(tidy_exhanges$name)))-> medians

semi_join(medians, freq_exc, by=c("name", "Order")) %>%
  select(name, simple_category, Order, median, tax)-> medians

quant<-medians$median %>% quantile(seq(0,1,0.05));quant

medians %>%
  ungroup %>%
  mutate(f_cat=case_when(
    median>0 & median<=quant[["85%"]] ~ 0.5,
    median>quant[["85%"]] & median<=quant[["100%"]] ~ 1,
    median<0 & median>=quant[["35%"]] ~ -0.5,
    median>=quant[["0%"]] & median<quant[["35%"]] ~ -1
  )) %>% 
  dplyr::select(tax, name, f_cat) %>% data.table ->medians1 
  medians1$name %>% unique
  medians1[CJ(tax = unique(tax), name = levels(medians1$name)), on = .(tax, name)]->medians2
  medians2$name %>% unique
  medians2[is.na(f_cat), f_cat := 0]
  
  medians2 %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = f_cat, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("tax") %>%
  as.matrix  -> order_mat

tidy_exhanges[name %in% medians$name,c("name", "simple_category")] %>%
    filter(simple_category %in% selected_classes) %>%
  unique %>% filter(name %in% colnames(order_mat)) %>%
  mutate(simple_category=
           factor(
           simple_category,
         levels = 
          selected_classes)) %>% arrange(simple_category) -> metab_cat

metab_class_vec=metab_cat$simple_category
names(metab_class_vec)=metab_cat$name


# Define splitting vectors
gem_analysis$Phylum %>% as.factor->phy_vec
names(phy_vec)=gem_analysis %>% pull(!!sym(tax_lev))

# Define HM body colors
flux_colors=c(alpha("cadetblue",1),
              alpha("cadetblue",0.3),
              "white",
              alpha("red",0.4),
              alpha("red",1)
              )

# Transpose matrix
reorder_mat<-order_mat %>% t
reorder_mat<-reorder_mat[names(metab_class_vec),]

# Bottom annot

# Number of predicted host
votu_order_count_all %>%
  filter(Order %in% colnames(reorder_mat)) -> votu_hits
votu_vec<-votu_hits$n_votu
names(votu_vec) = votu_hits$Order


# Relative abundance by Order
abund_order_df<-gem_analysis %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarise(sum=sum(mean_mag_abund))
abund_order_df$sum->abund_order_df_vec
names(abund_order_df_vec)=abund_order_df$Order
abund_order_df_vec %>% sort

# nGEMs by order
ngems_order_df<-gem_analysis %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarise(sum=length(OTU))
ngems_order_df$sum->ngems_order_df_vec
names(ngems_order_df_vec)=ngems_order_df$Order
ngems_order_df_vec %>% sort


# Predicted biomass growth
biomass_order_df<-gem_analysis %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarise(mean=mean(growth_value))
biomass_order_df$mean->biomass_order_df_vec
names(biomass_order_df_vec)=biomass_order_df$Order


bottom_annot<-
columnAnnotation(
  
  
   "Number of vOTUs\n linked to order" = 
     anno_barplot(x = votu_vec[colnames(reorder_mat)],
                 gp=gpar(fill="gray80"),
                 axis_param = list(labels_rot = 0,
                                   gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
                                   side = "right"
                                   #direction="reverse"
                                   ),
     ),
  

  "Avg. rel. abundance of vOTUs\n linked to order" = 
     anno_barplot(x = votu_host_order_abund_vec[colnames(reorder_mat)],
                 gp=gpar(fill="gray80"),
                 axis_param = list(labels_rot = 0,
                                   gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
                                   side = "right"
                                   #direction="reverse"
                                   ),
     ),
  
    "MAG rel. abundance\n by order (%)" = 
    anno_barplot(x = abund_order_df_vec[colnames(reorder_mat)],
                 gp=gpar(fill="gray80"),
                 axis_param = list(labels_rot = 0,
                                   gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
                                   side = "right"

                                   #direction="reverse"
                                   ),
                 ),
  
    spacer=anno_empty(border = F, height = unit(2, "mm")),
  show_legend = F,
  annotation_name_rot = 0,
  annotation_name_side = "right",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  annotation_name_offset = unit(0.6, "cm"),
  gap=unit(2,"mm")
  )

# Top annot
HeatmapAnnotation(
  "MAG phylum" = phy_vec[colnames(reorder_mat)],
  which = "column",
  col = list("MAG phylum"=tree_colors),
  border = T,  show_legend = F,
  show_annotation_name = F,
    annotation_name_side = "right"
)-> top_annot

# Right annot
rownames(reorder_mat)%in%
metab_react_matched_cpds3[!is.na(avg_rel_abund), name] %>% as.character->metaB_presence_vec
names(metaB_presence_vec)=rownames(reorder_mat)


right_annot<-
rowAnnotation(
  #spacer=anno_empty(border = F, height = unit(0.5, "mm")),
  "Detected metabolites"=metaB_presence_vec[rownames(reorder_mat)],
  annotation_name_side = "bottom",
  col=list("Detected metabolites"=c("FALSE"="white","TRUE"="gray80")),
  border=T,
  show_legend = F)

# left annot
fba_median_pos<-exchanges_summary$median_pos
names(fba_median_pos)<-exchanges_summary$name

fba_median_neg<-exchanges_summary$median_neg %>% abs
names(fba_median_neg)<-exchanges_summary$name

fba_median_neg[fba_median_neg>30]
fba_median_neg[fba_median_neg>30] = 30

left_annot<-rowAnnotation(
  "Median export flux\n[mmol/gDWh]" = 
    anno_barplot(x = fba_median_pos[rownames(reorder_mat)],
                 gp=gpar(fill="gray80"),
                 axis_param = list(labels_rot = 90,
                                   gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
                                   direction="reverse"
                                   )),
    "Median import flux\n[mmol/gDWh]" = 
    anno_barplot(x = fba_median_neg[rownames(reorder_mat)],
                gp=gpar(fill="gray80"),
                axis_param = list(labels_rot = 90,
                                  gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
                                  direction="reverse"
                                  )),
  spacer=anno_empty(border = F, width = unit(1, "mm")),

  show_legend = F,
  annotation_name_rot = 90,
  annotation_name_side = "top",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  annotation_name_offset = unit(0.1, "cm"),
  gap=unit(2,"mm")
  )


#reorder_mat<-order_mat[,(metab_cat$name)]
dim(order_mat[, names(metab_class_vec)])
Heatmap(
  reorder_mat,
  col=flux_colors, na_col = "white",
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "gray20", lwd = 0.3),
  border_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 0.7),
  row_gap= unit(3, "mm"),
  column_gap= unit(3, "mm"),
  row_split = metab_class_vec,
  column_title_rot = 45,
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=13),
  column_names_rot = 45,
  column_names_gp  = gpar(fontsize=13),
  column_title_side = "bottom",
  column_split = phy_vec[colnames(reorder_mat)],
  column_names_side = "top",
  row_title_rot=0,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
  row_title_gp  = gpar(fontsize=13),
  border = T,
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  cluster_column_slices = F,
  cluster_row_slices = F,
  show_column_dend = F,
  show_row_dend = F,
  heatmap_height = unit(19, "in"),
  #heatmap_width = unit(14, "in"),
  show_heatmap_legend = F,
  right_annotation = right_annot,
  top_annotation = bottom_annot,
  bottom_annotation = top_annot,
  left_annotation = left_annot
) ->hm
png(filename = 
      paste0(
      "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_exchanges_test_v2.png"),
    width = 17, height = 20, units = "in", res = 300)
draw(hm, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom", annotation_legend_side = "bottom")
dev.off()

file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_exchanges_test_v2.png")

```

## Distribution of complete pws for key categories
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Import pwy data

files<-list.files(path = "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/metaG/coassemby_07feb24/mags_c70c10a99/gapseq/",
                  pattern ="-all-Pathways.tbl", full.names = T)
foreach(i = files)%do%{
fread(i) %>%
  filter(Prediction) %>% 
  mutate(sbs_ids = str_remove_all(ID, "\\|")) %>%
  left_join(sbs_hier1) %>%
    add_column(OTU=str_extract(i, "[:alpha:]{3}_SemiBin_[:digit:]+"))
  } %>% rbindlist -> pws

pws %>%
  select(OTU, Name, h2, h3, h4, h5, ReactionsFound) %>%
  left_join(gem_analysis[,c("OTU", "Order")]) %>%
  rowwise %>%
  mutate(n_react=length(unlist(strsplit(ReactionsFound, " ")))) %>% data.table -> pws1


# vOTU abundance by host order
votu_host_order_abund<-fread("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/tables/votu_host_order_mean.csv")
votu_host_order_abund$Order = str_remove(votu_host_order_abund$Order,"o__")
votu_host_order_abund_vec<-votu_host_order_abund$mean
names(votu_host_order_abund_vec) = votu_host_order_abund$Order

# Select thos with at least two votus
votu_order_count_all %>%
  filter(n_votu>=2) %>% arrange(n_votu) -> order_min2_votu


# Select relevant pwys and summarise
pws1$h4 %>% unique
pws1[h3 == "CARBOXYLATES-DEG", Name] %>% unique %>% view
pws1[grepl("Xylan|Inulin|Pectin|Cellulose|Starch", Name, ignore.case = T) &
     !grepl("Biosynthesis", Name, ignore.case = T)] %>% add_column(type="Polysaccharide \ndegradation") -> df1

pws1[grepl("Calvin|Wood|Reductive TCA|3-hydroxypropanoate cycle", Name)] %>% add_column(type="CO2 fixation") -> df2

pws1[grepl("lactate ferment|pyruvate fermentation to acetate|ethanol|fermentation to butanoate|	
propanoate fermentation|acetate conversion", Name, ignore.case = F) & 
       h4 == c("Fermentation-to-Acids")] %>% add_column(type="Fermentation") -> df3

pws1[grepl("glyoxylate cycle", Name, ignore.case = F)] %>% add_column(type="Energy metabolism") -> df4

pws1[grepl("Tyrosine|Arginine|histidine", Name, ignore.case = T) & 
     !grepl("arginine decarboxylase", Name, ignore.case = T) &
     h4 %in% c("Proteinogenic-Amino-Acids-Degradation") | 
     h4 == "4-Aminobutyraye-Degradation"] %>% 
  add_column(type="Proteinogenic \namino acid \ndegradation") -> df5

pws1[h4 %in% c("Purine-Degradation", "Pyrimidine-Degradation") &
     !grepl("L-arginine degradation IV", Name, ignore.case = T)] %>% add_column(type="Nucleotide degradation")-> df6

pws1[grepl("trehalose|xylose|fucose|melibiose|lactose|cellobiose", Name, ignore.case = T) & 
      h4 %in% c("Sugars-And-Polysaccharides-Degradation") &
     !grepl("periplasmic|cytosolic|trehalose degradation IV", Name, ignore.case = T)
     ] %>% 
  add_column(type="Carbohydrate degradation")-> df7

rbind(df1, df2) %>%
  rbind(df3) %>%
  rbind(df4) %>%
  rbind(df5) %>%
  rbind(df6) %>%
  rbind(df7) %>%
    filter(Order %in% order_min2_votu$Order)-> df

df$type %>% unique

df %>%
  group_by(Order, Name, type) %>% 
  summarise(nmag = length(unique(OTU))) %>% 
  left_join(order_nmags, by= "Order") %>%
  mutate(p=100*(nmag/n)) %>% select(Order, Name, type) %>%
  unique %>% 
  mutate(p=case_when(type=="Polysaccharide \ndegradation"~ 1,
                     type=="CO2 fixation"~ 2,
                     type=="Fermentation"~ 3,
                     type=="Energy metabolism"~4,
                     type=="Nucleotide degradation"~ 5,
                     type=="Proteinogenic \namino acid \ndegradation"~ 6,
                     type=="Carbohydrate degradation" ~ 7
                     )) %>% select(Order, Name, p) -> pwy_count
  

pwy_count %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Order, values_from = p, values_fill = 0) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Name")  %>% as.matrix -> mat


# Define splitting vectors columns
gem_analysis$Phylum %>% as.factor->phy_vec
names(phy_vec)=gem_analysis %>% pull(Order)

# Define row splits
df %>% select(Name, type) %>% unique -> rsplit
rsplit$type %<>% factor(levels = c(
                         "Polysaccharide \ndegradation",
                         "Carbohydrate degradation",
                         "CO2 fixation",
                         "Fermentation",
                         "Energy metabolism",
                         "Nucleotide degradation",
                         "Proteinogenic \namino acid \ndegradation"
                       ))
rsplit$type -> rsplit_vec
names(rsplit_vec)=rsplit %>% pull(Name)

# Top annot
HeatmapAnnotation(
  "MAG phylum" = phy_vec[colnames(mat)],
  which = "column",
  col = list("MAG phylum"=tree_colors),
  border = T,  show_legend = F,
  show_annotation_name = F,
    annotation_name_side = "right"
)-> top_annot



require(ComplexHeatmap)

library(circlize)
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7),
  colors = c(
    "white",                  
    "green4",
    "gray50",
    "orange",
    "lightgoldenrod1",
    "lightblue",
    "lightcoral",
    "olivedrab3"
  ),transparency = 0.3
)

Heatmap(
  mat[rsplit$Name,],
  name="xxx",
  col = col_fun,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "gray20", lwd = 0.5),
  border_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 0.9),
  row_gap= unit(3, "mm"),
  column_gap= unit(3, "mm"),
  row_split = rsplit_vec[],
  column_title_rot = 45,
  column_names_rot = 45,
  #column_names_gp  = gpar(fontsize=2),
  column_split = phy_vec[colnames(mat)],
  column_title_side = "bottom",
  #column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=1)
  #row_split = aux_gem_annot_vec[rownames(mag_vir_hm)],
  row_title_rot=0, 
  #row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=1),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=9),
  column_names_side = "top",
  border = T,
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  cluster_column_slices = F,
  cluster_row_slices = F,
  show_column_dend = F,
  show_row_dend = F,
  #heatmap_height = unit(3, "in"),
  heatmap_width = unit(11, "in"),
  show_heatmap_legend = F,
  top_annotation = top_annot
) -> hm;hm

png(filename = 
      paste0(
      "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_pws.png"),
    width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 600)
draw(hm)
dev.off()

file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_pws.png")

cairo_pdf(file = 
      paste0(
      "~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_pws.pdf"),
    width = 16, height = 12)
draw(hm)
dev.off()

file.show("~/rstudio-server/nvme_4tb/riccardo/analysis/boschettona23/Results/man_v2/figures/hm_pws.pdf")
```


#---- METABOLITE UTILISATION ----
# SULFUR
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed","produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)

# Sulfate
key_metabolites[name=="Sulfate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00048", tidy_reactions[]) %>% datatable
tidy_reactions[react_name=="ATP:sulfate adenylyltransferase"] %>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% print(n=50)


key_metabolites[name=="APS"]
find_metab_react("cpd00193", tidy_reactions[]) %>% datatable
fba_reactions[react_id=="rxn00379_c0"] %>%
  group_by(react_name) %>% count

key_metabolites[name=="3-phosphoadenylylsulfate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00044", tidy_reactions[]) %>% datatable

# CHECK PAPS reductases
tidy_reactions[react_id=="rxn05239_c0"] %>%
  select(OTU, react_name, Phylum, Order) %>% unique-> sel_react

sel_react$OTU %>% unique %>% length
sel_react %>% group_by(Phylum) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(phy_count) %>% mutate(100*(n/n_phyla))

sel_react %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(order_count) %>% mutate(prop=100*(n/n_order))

tidy_reactions[react_id=="rxn09069_c0"] %>% 
  select(OTU, react_name, Phylum, Order) %>% unique-> sel_react

sel_react$OTU %>% unique %>% length
sel_react %>% group_by(Phylum) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(phy_count) %>% mutate(100*(n/n_phyla))

sel_react %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(order_count) %>% mutate(prop=100*(n/n_order))


key_metabolites[name=="Taurine"]
find_metab_react("cpd00210", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable
#Is taurine linked to O2?
tidy_exhanges[name=="Taurine", ]

key_metabolites[name=="Sulfoacetaldehyde"]
find_metab_react("cpd00460", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Sulfoacetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd09878", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

# Sulfide
key_metabolites[name=="L-Methionine"]
find_metab_react("cpd00060", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="S-Adenosyl-L-methionine"]
find_metab_react("cpd00017", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

# How produces more S-Methilthioribose?
key_metabolites[grep("5-Methylthio-D-ribose", name)]
tidy_exhanges[react_id=="EX_cpd01981_e0", Order] %>% table %>% sort

tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn05909_c0"] %>% 
  select(OTU, react_name, Phylum, Order) %>% unique-> sel_react

sel_react$OTU %>% unique %>% length
sel_react %>% group_by(Phylum) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(phy_count) %>% mutate(100*(n/n_phyla))


key_metabolites[name=="L-Cysteine"]
find_metab_react("cpd00084", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[grepl("Cyste",name)]
find_metab_react("cpd00084", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable
# Cysteine conversion to Serine and Pyruvate
tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn05909_c0"] %>% 
  select(OTU, react_name, Phylum, Order) %>% unique-> sel_react

sel_react$OTU %>% unique %>% length
sel_react %>% group_by(Phylum) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(phy_count) %>% mutate(100*(n/n_phyla))

sel_react %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(order_count) %>% mutate(prop=100*(n/n_order))


tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn00566_c0"] %>% 
  select(OTU, react_name, Phylum, Order) %>% unique-> sel_react

sel_react$OTU %>% unique %>% length
sel_react %>% group_by(Phylum) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(phy_count) %>% mutate(100*(n/n_phyla))

sel_react %>% group_by(Order) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>%
left_join(order_count) %>% mutate(prop=100*(n/n_order)) %>% print(n=50)


# Virus
#Sulfate
blast_phold[grepl("sulfate",product)]
gem_react_genes[OTU=="nat_SemiBin_881" & grepl("megahit_391107", gene)] %>%
  left_join(gem_analysis[,c("OTU", "Order")])

phold_annot2[grepl("phosphoadenosine phosphosulfate reductase", product)]

phold_annot2[grepl("Galactose-3-O-sulfotransferase", product), votu] %>%
  unique->votus
length(votus)
phold_annot2[votu%in% votus] %>% group_by(product) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>% print(n=200)
vir_analysis[votu%in%votus, c("Class", "size_kb", "host_taxonomy")] 

phold_annot2[grepl("phosphoadenosine phosphosulfate reductase", product), votu] %>% unique->votus
length(votus)
phold_annot2[votu%in% votus] %>% 
  group_by(product) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>% print(n=200)
vir_analysis[votu%in%votus, c("Class", "size_kb", "host_taxonomy")]

phold_annot2[grepl("S-adenosyl", product), votu] %>% unique->votus
length(votus)
phold_annot2[votu%in% votus] %>% 
  group_by(product) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>% print(n=200)
vir_analysis[votu%in%votus, c("Class", "size_kb", "host_taxonomy")]

phold_annot2[grepl("cyst", product), votu] %>% unique->votus
length(votus)
phold_annot2[votu%in% votus] %>% 
  group_by(product) %>% 
  count(sort = T) %>% print(n=200)
vir_analysis[votu%in%votus, c("Class", "size_kb", "host_taxonomy")]
```

## Examine products
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)

find_metab_react("cpd00239", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="5-Methylthio-D-ribose"]
find_metab_react("cpd01981", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable
```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[simple_category=="Sulfur compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)
```



#-
# CARBOHYDRATES
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Polysaccharides"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Carbohydrates"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Sugar Alcohols"];selected_mets

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)


selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Polysaccharides"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Carbohydrates"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Sugar Alcohols"];selected_mets


met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)

# POlysaccharides
tidy_reactions_f[grepl("starch", definition), react_name] %>% table
tidy_reactions_f[grepl("starch", definition), Order] %>% table %>% sort

tidy_reactions_f[grepl("Xyla", definition), react_name] %>% table
tidy_reactions_f[grepl("Xyla", definition), Order] %>% table %>% sort

tidy_reactions_f[grepl("Inulin", definition), react_name] %>% table
tidy_reactions_f[grepl("Inulin", definition), Order] %>% table %>% sort

#Monosaccharides
key_metabolites[name=="D-Glucose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00027", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Galactose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00108", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Dulcose"]
find_metab_react("cpd01171", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="D-Fructose", id, name]
find_metab_react("cpd00082", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="Sorbitol", id, name]
find_metab_react("cpd00588", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="D-fructose-6-phosphate", id, name]
find_metab_react("cpd00072", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

tidy_reactions[grepl("ATP:D-fructose 1-phosphotransferase", react_name)]

tidy_reactions[grepl("gamma-glutamylaminopeptidase", react_name)]
key_metabolites[name=="Cys-Gly", id, name]
find_metab_react("cpd01017", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable


key_metabolites[grepl("Oxoproline",name), id, name]
find_metab_react("cpd01293", tidy_reactions) %>% datatable

```

## Examine products
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Polysaccharides"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Carbohydrates"];selected_mets
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Sugar Alcohols"];selected_mets

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[eval(exp)];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)
```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[simple_category=="Polysaccharides"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[eval(exp)];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_anaero)
```

#-
# ALCOHLS
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Alcohols"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)


selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Alcohols"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)

# Methanol
key_metabolites[name=="Methanol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00116", tidy_reactions[]) %>% datatable

#Converted all to formaldehyde
tidy_exhanges[name=="Formaldehyde", ] 

key_metabolites[name=="Formaldehyde"]
find_metab_react("cpd00055", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable

gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

```

## Examine products
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Alcohols"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
            ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)


selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[eval(exp),];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)
react_hm(react_df=fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F])
```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[eval(exp)];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[eval(exp)];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_anaero)
```
#-
# CARBOXYLS
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds",];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           tidy_reactions_f,
           "consumed",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

 selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)


substrate_fba_median
############# Formate ################
key_metabolites[name=="Formate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00047", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable
gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

############# Lactate ################
key_metabolites[name=="L-Lactate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00159", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable
gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

############# Malate ################
key_metabolites[name=="L-Malate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00130", tidy_reactions_f[]) -> res; res %>% datatable
gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

key_metabolites[name=="Oxaloacetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00032", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Malyl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd02662", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Glyoxalate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00040", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="Sinapoyl malate"]
find_metab_react("cpd01849", tidy_reactions[]) -> res; res %>% datatable

############# 2-Oxoglutarate ################
key_metabolites[name=="2-Oxoglutarate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00024", tidy_reactions_f[]) -> res; res %>% datatable
gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

```

## Examine products
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds",];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
            ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)


selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds",];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)
react_hm(react_df=fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F])
react_hm(react_df=fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T])

```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[simple_category=="Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_anaero)
```
#-
# Metals
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Metals",
                                      ];selected_mets

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           tidy_reactions,
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

# Who uses cobalt for biosynth?
#Cobaltochelatase
tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn04045_c0"]%>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count(sort = T)

#hydrogenobyrinic-acid-a,c-diamide:cobalt cobalt-ligase (ADP-forming)
tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn03542_c0"] %>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count(sort = T)

# Fe3+ oxidation

tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn00068_c0"]%>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count(sort = T)

# Mg in chlorophyllide
tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn02733_c0"]%>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count(sort = T) #nope
```
#-
# N-carbonyls
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)


selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)


# Follow betaine degradation
res$react_summary[metabolite=="Betaine"] %>% datatable

key_metabolites[grepl("Betaine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00540",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) %>% datatable()

key_metabolites[grepl("Betaine aldehyde",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00447",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) %>% datatable()

key_metabolites[grepl("Choline",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00098",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) -> res;res%>%datatable()

sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]

key_metabolites[grepl("Methylamine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00441",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) %>% datatable()

key_metabolites[grepl("Dimethylglycine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00756",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) %>% datatable()


# Follow S-Adenosyl-L-methionine
fba_reactions[grepl("S-Adenosyl-L-methionine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name,definition) %>% count 


phold_annot2[votu %in%
blast_phold[grepl("S-adenosylmethionine decarboxylase", product), votu]] 


fba_reactions[grepl("methioninamine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% count 

key_metabolites[grepl("Niacin",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00218",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) %>% datatable()

fba_reactions[grepl("nicotinamide",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) 

fba_reactions[grepl("methylamine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) 

```

## Examine products 
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero) 
react_hm(react_df=fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F])

key_metabolites[grepl("Urea",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00073",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) -> res;res%>%datatable()
key_metabolites[grepl("Ornithine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00064",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions) -> res;res%>%datatable()
```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_anaero)
```
# -
# Amino acids
## Examine substrates
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_aero[simple_category=="Amino acids"];selected_mets

met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

res$react_summary[metabolite=="L-Methionine"] %>% datatable
res$react_summary[metabolite=="L-Cysteine"] %>% datatable


selected_mets<-sorted_substrates_anaero[simple_category=="Amino acids"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_substrates_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "consumed",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero)

# Follow methionine degradation
key_metabolites[grepl("L-Methionine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00060",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]

key_metabolites[grepl("2-Aminobut-2-enoate",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd17424",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) %>% datatable()

key_metabolites[grepl("2-Oxobutyrate",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00094",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) %>% datatable()

key_metabolites[grepl("S-Adenosyl-L-methionine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00017",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) -> res;res%>%datatable()


sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]

######################################################
# Follow threonine degradation
key_metabolites[grepl("L-threonine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00161",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]


key_metabolites[grepl("Amino-acetoacetate",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd02211",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]

######################################################

key_metabolites[grepl("L-Histidine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00119",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]


######################################################
key_metabolites[grepl("L-Alanine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00035",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]
######################################################
key_metabolites[grepl("L-Serine",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00054",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), ]

######################################################
key_metabolites[grepl("L-Glutamate",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00023",
                 reactions =  tidy_reactions_f) -> res;res%>%datatable()
sbs_hier1[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";")), h4] %>% table %>% sort
######################################################

key_metabolites[grepl("Cysteate",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00051",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) %>% datatable()

fba_reactions[grepl("S-Adenosyl-L-methionine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name,definition) %>% count 


phold_annot2[votu %in%
blast_phold[grepl("S-adenosylmethionine decarboxylase", product), votu]] 


fba_reactions[grepl("methioninamine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% count 

key_metabolites[grepl("Niacin",name, ignore.case=T)]
find_metab_react(met_id="cpd00218",
                 reactions =  fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F]) %>% datatable()

fba_reactions[grepl("nicotinamide",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% view

fba_reactions[grepl("methylamine",react_name)] %>% 
  group_by(react_name, definition) %>% 
  summarise(median_fba=median(fba_flux),
            n=n()
            ) %>% view

```

## Examine products (NO products)
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_products_aero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_aero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           "produced",
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_products_anaero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_products_anaero,
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           "produced",
           ko_f_anaero, fisher_anaero) 
react_hm(react_df=fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F])
```

## Examine mixed
```{r eval=TRUE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_aero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==T & anaerobic==F],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_aero)

selected_mets<-sorted_mixed_anaero[simple_category=="N-Carbonyl compounds"];selected_mets
met_report(selected_mets,
           fba_comp_metab1[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           fba_reactions_f[sim_O2==F & anaerobic==T],
           c("consumed", "produced", "transported"),
           ko_f_aero, fisher_anaero)
```
#----

# ORDER - SPECIFIC REPORTS
#################################################

## Bacteroidales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Acetate production is high and enhriched in Chromatiales, why?
key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")%>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
res$react_name[1:5]

tidy_reactions_f[react_id2 == 'rxn00172'] %>%
  group_by(Order) %>% count %>% arrange(desc(n))

key_metabolites[name=="Acetyl-CoA", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00022", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
res$react_name[1:5]


key_metabolites[name=="Acetylphosphate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00196", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
res$react_name[1:5]


key_metabolites[name=="Pyruvate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00020", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="L-Lactate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00159", tidy_reactions[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
Lactate
```

## Chromatiales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Acetate production is high and enhriched in Chromatiales, why?
tidy_exhanges[name=="CO2" & fba_flux<0, c("OTU", "Order")]

key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")%>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
res$react_name[1:5]

key_metabolites[name=="Acetyl-CoA", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00022", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable
res$react_name[1:5]

key_metabolites[name=="Pyruvate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00020", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales" & abs(fba_flux)>1]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced") %>% arrange(desc(prop_gems))-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="CO2"]
find_metab_react("cpd00011", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

tidy_reactions_f[react_id=="rxn07189_c0"] %>% count(Order, sort = T)
#################################################

key_metabolites[name=="Oxaloacetate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00032", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Succinate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00036", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable 

key_metabolites[name=="Ethanol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00363", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable 

key_metabolites[name=="Acetaldehyde"]
find_metab_react("cpd00071", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable 


key_metabolites[name=="Fumarate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00106", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) -> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="CO2"]
find_metab_react("cpd00011", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Oxaloacetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00032", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Hydrogen"]
find_metab_react("cpd11640", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Hydrogen"]
find_metab_react("cpd11640", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Chromatiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable
```

## Caldilineales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="CO2", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00011", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Caldilineales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced" , prop_gems>50) -> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Formate", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00047", tidy_reactions[Order == "Caldilineales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable
```

## Pseudomonadales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Acetyl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00022", tidy_reactions[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Succinate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00036", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable
gapseq_pwy_hierarchy[sbs %in% unlist(strsplit(res$sbs_ids , ";"))] %>% view

key_metabolites[name=="Succinyl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00078", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="indol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00281", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="GABA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00281", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="L-Lactate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00159", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Butyrate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00211", tidy_reactions[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Butyryl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00120", tidy_reactions[Order == "Pseudomonadales"])-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Crotonyl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00650", tidy_reactions[Order == "Pseudomonadales"])-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="(S)-3-Hydroxybutyryl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00842", tidy_reactions[Order == "Pseudomonadales"])-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Oxalate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00180", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Ammonium"]
find_metab_react("cpd00013", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Pseudomonadales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable


```

## Desulfobacterales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Acetyl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00022", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="2-Oxoglutarate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00024", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="L-Lactate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00159", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="GABA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00281", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Butyrate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00211", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobacterales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable
```

## Rhizobiales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="Ethanol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00363", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Acetaldehyde"]
find_metab_react("cpd00071", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Methanol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00116", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Propionate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00141", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="indol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00359", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Thiamin", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00305", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Hydrogen"]
find_metab_react("cpd11640", tidy_reactions[Order == "Rhizobiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable
```


## Desulfobulbales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="Propionate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00141", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="CO2"]
find_metab_react("cpd00011", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable
tidy_exhanges[Order == "Desulfobulbales" & fba_flux<0 & name == "Hydrogen"]

key_metabolites[name=="indol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00359", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Hydrogen"]
find_metab_react("cpd11640", tidy_reactions[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Butyrate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00211", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Butyryl-CoA"]
find_metab_react("cpd00120", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Methanethiol"]
find_metab_react("cpd00324", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable
Urea
key_metabolites[name=="Urea", c("id", "name")]
find_metab_react("cpd00073", tidy_reactions[Order == "Desulfobulbales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable
```

## Bacteroidales 2
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
tidy_exhanges[Order == "Bacteroidales" &
                simple_category == "Carbonyl compounds" &
                  fba_flux>0
                ] %>% 
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(n=n(),
            median=median(fba_flux))  %>%
  arrange(n, median)

key_metabolites[name=="Xylose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00154", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Glucuronate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00164", tidy_reactions[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="L-Fucose", c("name", "id")]
find_metab_react("cpd00751", tidy_reactions[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable


key_metabolites[name=="Acetate"]
find_metab_react("cpd00029", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Galactose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00108", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Galactose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00108", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="L-Fucose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00751", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="L-Fuculose"]
find_metab_react("cpd01186", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable

key_metabolites[name=="Maltose"]
find_metab_react("cpd00179", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Bacteroidales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "produced")-> res; res %>% datatable

```

## Woeseiales
```{r eval=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
key_metabolites[name=="Cytidine"]
find_metab_react("cpd00367", tidy_reactions_f[Order == "Woeseiales"]) %>%
  filter(utilisation == "consumed")-> res; res %>% datatable
```
